summary:
A new vehicle harness end is
already installed on your replacement starter.
Nissan starting symptom malfunctions may NOT be caused by the starter.

Remove the
inspection cover and
measure the clearance
between the top of a flywheel
tooth and the starter

armature shaft by inserting “aie 1/8” Drill

the back end of a 1/8” drill Bit

bit.

The replacement starter in the box may look

different than the original.
